contents:
Passion and curiosity, two words that describe my lifestyle. Native of the Ardennes, I have always been very curious about the world of science. This led me to discover the digital world and programming at a young age. My first language, the one that made me discover algorithms and the way to code, is Java.
In a high school in Sedan, I obtained a baccalaureate S - Engineering Sciences, which allowed me to satisfy my technical curiosity, through the teaching of mechanics, electrical engineering and computing.
title: About me

contents: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
title: Markdown Syntax Guide

contents: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.
title: Rich Content
